prompt: у меня при запуске npm run dev выскакивает Error: Cannot find module '../lib/utils' но файл точно есть, я проверял

assertions.text: Restates the problem before proposing anything
Asks at least one clarifying question before offering fixes
Does NOT propose a concrete fix/command in the first response
Separates symptom (module not found) from possible root causes
Asks ONE question at a time (not a barrage of 3+)
